textPlain: The satellite view shows this off much better than Wikipedia's ground-level picture. It Really is just a long band of holes dug into the side of a mountain.https://www.google.com/maps/place/13%C2%B042'20.0%22S+75%C2%...
Reminds me of one of my favorite horror stories (NSFW):https://imgur.com/gallery/lni-enigma-of-amigara-fault-junji-...
That’s a lot of holes.It seems obvious to me they were made by the landing pylons of heavy-lift alien spacecraft.
There's also some better pictures in one of the article's sources: https://web.archive.org/web/20160205050218/http://strzyzewsk...
That was rather good, thank you!
